MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Compromise of an Adult Person With a Disability hearing this day.
Dept. 611, Judge Diane Wick, Clerk: L. Bura/Sajja, CSR: Candace Yount, Bailiff: R. Guitron.
Paul Vaillancourt, Esq. for Petitioner: Irene Rodriguez, present as Guardian at litem for Claimant: Scott Rodriguez.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Medical Expenses $734.69
